questions.title: Find Maximum Element
questions.description: Given an integer N followed by N space-separated integers representing an array, find and print the maximum element present in the array. The array may contain negative numbers as well.

questions.title: Two Sum
questions.description: Given an array of integers and a target value, return the indices of the two numbers such that they add up to the target. If no such pair exists, return -1.

questions.title: Maximum Subarray
questions.description: Given an integer array, find the contiguous subarray (containing at least one number) which has the largest sum and return its sum.

questions.title: Valid Parentheses
questions.description: Given a string containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid. A string is valid if brackets are closed in the correct order.

questions.title: Sliding Window Maximum
questions.description: Given an array of integers and a window size k, find the maximum element in every contiguous subarray of size k.

questions.title: Reverse String
questions.description: Given a string, reverse it and print the reversed string.

questions.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
questions.description: Given a string, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

questions.title: Fibonacci
questions.description: Given an integer N, print the Nth Fibonacci number. Assume F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.

questions.title: Activity Selection
questions.description: Given start and end times of activities, select the maximum number of non-overlapping activities.

questions.title: Permutations
questions.description: Given a list of numbers, generate all possible permutations of the list.
